name: Forklift malfunctioned and dropped load on me at job in West Valley, sue maker?
description: Yes, sue for defect beyond comp.

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, product liability third-party claim if defect proven.[4] Context: Design flaws common. Key factors: Maintenance history, expert testing. Practical guidance: Don't repair forklift; attorney files against manufacturer. Extra damages.
